profile.role_zh: 电气工程大三·机器人队队长
profile.innate_zh: 工程直觉好、领导力强、不怕失败
profile.learned_zh: 机器人竞赛训练出的调试能力和团队协作能力
profile.learned_en: Debugging and teamwork from robotics contests
profile.goal_zh: 机器人竞赛国赛一等奖
profile.goal_en: First prize at national robotics contest
profile.contradiction_zh: 想赢比赛 vs 队员能力参差不齐
profile.contradiction_en: Wants to win vs. teammates' levels vary
profile.deep_zh: 怕自己的决定让整个队吃亏
profile.deep_en: Fears his calls hurt the whole team
profile.desire_zh: 在赛场上证明团队的实力
profile.desire_en: Proving team strength on the field
profile.rhythm_zh: 白天上课，所有空余时间都在调机器人
profile.rhythm_en: Classes by day; every spare minute debugging
profile.spaces_zh: 机器人实验室、电气楼、操场（测试场地）
profile.spaces_en: Robotics lab, electrical bldg, track (test field)
profile.long_desire_zh: 比赛前一个月完成全部调试
profile.long_desire_en: Done debugging a month before the contest
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天解决机械臂的抖动问题
profile.short_goal_en: Fix the robot arm jitter today
profile.constraint_zh: 电路板烧了一块；比赛只剩三周
profile.constraint_en: Fried one PCB; three weeks to contest
profile.bias_zh: 倾向亲自动手而不是培养队员能力
profile.bias_en: Does too much himself, under-develops team
profile.narrative_zh: 这个bug不解决今晚谁都别走
profile.narrative_en: Nobody leaves tonight until this bug is dead
